mapper.select: SELECT * FROM books ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT * FROM books WHERE 1=1
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR isbn LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND stock BETWEEN 1 AND 9
AND stock = 0
AND publisher = #{publisher}
ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO books (isbn, title, author, publisher, price, cost_price, stock, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{isbn}, #{title}, #{author}, #{publisher}, #{price}, #{costPrice}, #{stock}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE books SET stock = stock + #{delta} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM books WHERE id = #{id}
